seo.title: Partners and brands — Vukan's Bike
seo.description: Partners and teams: Reverse Components, Flat Out Days, Goodyear Bike, BATT Crew, Loose Riders, ŠKTD Apače Mlinarji, 427 Savage Squad, and more.

props.headline: Partners and brands
props.subheadline: We work with brands and organisations from the bike scene — from trail and MTB to the wider community.

props.heading: Partners we work with
props.subheading: Component and tyre brands, festivals, trail building, local clubs and race teams — reliable partners in cycling.

partners.name: Reverse Components
partners.about: German brand for MTB and e-bike components from Freudenstadt (Black Forest), since 2004. Motto “by bikers for bikers”: handlebars, wheels, saddles, pedals and more, tested e.g. at the EFBE lab. Represented in over 25 countries.

partners.name: Flat Out Days
partners.about: Slovenia’s largest mountain bike festival — now a multi-day event at Bikepark Kope with Freeride Fest Series, whip-off, dual slalom, workshops and music. Started in 2017 as a small whip-off in Ljubljana; today focused on community and progress in the sport.
partners.linkLabel: Flat Out Days — tickets and programme

partners.name: Goodyear Bike
partners.about: Official bicycle line from Goodyear (goodyearbike.com): high-performance tyres for road, gravel, trekking/urban and MTB — e.g. Eagle, Vector, Connector, Newton and Escape. The site also has a pressure calculator and tubeless guides.

partners.name: BATT Crew
partners.about: Team from Domžale planning and building safe, sustainable MTB trails and bike parks (including Agi Bike Park and major renewal work at Bikepark Kope). Documentation, signage, rescue concepts and photo/video. Co-founded Flat Out Days in 2017.

partners.name: Loose Riders
partners.about: Global brand and community (LRGA): technical apparel, protection, accessories and bike parts. Born from the trail community (2012), now local “chapters” worldwide — from Chiang Mai to Europe.

partners.name: Apače Mlinarji
partners.about: ŠKTD (sports, culture and tourism association) Apače Mlinarji organises mountain bike races on home terrain — including stages of the Pomurski MTB Cup and special night races. Strong support for youth categories and the local scene.

partners.name: 427 Savage Squad
partners.about: Maribor race team in downhill and enduro (club 427 Pohorje) with Jure Logar. Academy with limited spots; known riders include Maša Komel and Miha Jerkič. Coordinated across Europe with DH cups.

props.heading: Looking for a bike or service?
